boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Chain must supply pre-change callback source plus VM approval, bank ownership, and matching REL authority.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-QUA-071-P requires pre-change callback source; CALL-QUA-071 confirms it is absent.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CALL-QUA-071 explicitly used post-change email thread instead of pre-change phone source, leaving one required gate open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: All four policy gates must close before 2026-06-28 release; pre-change callback remains unsatisfied.

final_answer: ESCALATE. CALL-QUA-071 shows callback used post-change email thread rather than pre-change vendor-master phone source. STD-QUA-071-P requires all four gates closed by the chain before release. One gate remains open, so payment may not proceed. VM-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071 and REL-QUA-071 satisfy the other three gates but cannot override the missing pre-change confirmation.
open_blockers: missing pre-change callback source per policy gate 1
